metadata.description: Agent skills for exploring and curating the KG-Registry of knowledge graphs, ontologies, and data sources.

plugins.name: kg-registry-discovery
plugins.description: Read-only skills for exploring the KG-Registry over HTTP (no local clone needed): search resources by topic or domain, trace a resource's upstream data sources, find everywhere a resource is used, and find similar resources. Each queries the published Parquet files at https://kghub.org/kg-registry/registry/parquet/ via DuckDB.

plugins.name: kg-registry-curation
plugins.description: Skills for curating and maintaining KG-Registry resource pages from a local clone of the repository: expand and edit a resource, curate the next batch of stubs, validate a curated page, and update a stale product URL.
